====Pokémon====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Barry
|pkmn=Empoleon
|stage1=Piplup
|stage2=Prinplup
|type1=Water
|type2=Steel
|img=Barry {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Piplup|1=Prinplup}} Evolutions.png
|cap=Barry's {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Piplup|1=Prinplup}}
|img2=Barry Empoleon Evolutions.png
|cap2=Barry's Empoleon
|hd=yes
|epnum=PE05
|epname=The Rival
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Empoleon}} is Barry's main Pokémon and also his [[first partner Pokémon]]. He obtained it as a {{p|Piplup}} at [[Lake Verity]]. Later, it helped him win his first [[Badge|Gym Badge]] by defeating [[Roark's Cranidos]]. After evolving into {{p|Prinplup}}, it battled against [[Jupiter]]'s {{p|Skuntank}}, but lost. After fully evolving, it battled Skuntank again at the [[Spear Pillar]], this time emerging victorious. Later, when Barry challenged [[Palmer]] at the {{si|Battle Tower}}, Empoleon was his final Pokémon. It managed to defeat Palmer's {{p|Rhyperior}}, making Barry the winner.

Empoleon's known moves are {{m|Pound}}, {{m|Bubble}}, {{m|Bubble Beam}}, {{m|Metal Claw}}, and {{m|Hydro Pump}}.}}

|desc={{p|Heracross}} is Barry's second known Pokémon and the first one he was seen using against [[Palmer]] at the {{si|Battle Tower}}, where he was defeated by {{p|Milotic}}.

{{TrainerPoké

|desc={{p|Staraptor}} is Barry's third known Pokémon and the second one he was seen using at the {{si|Battle Tower}}, where it defeated [[Palmer]]'s {{p|Dragonite}} before losing to {{p|Rhyperior}}.

Staraptor's only known move is {{m|Aerial Ace}}.}}
